disclaimer.searchBanner: E-Douane provides tariff data for informational purposes only. Always verify rates and regulations with official customs authorities before making import/export decisions.
disclaimer.footerText: E-Douane is an independent platform and is not affiliated with or endorsed by any government entity. Data is sourced from publicly available customs tariff schedules.

billing.title: Billing History
billing.subtitle: View your invoices and subscription details

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your account preferences
settingsPage.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface

landing.heroSubtitle: Search 15,000+ Algerian tariff codes, calculate duties, and stay compliant — all in one platform.
landing.bottomBanner: Real-time data + HS code search + duty calculator + full compliance
landing.servicesSubtitle: Powerful tools for smooth customs operations in Algeria
landing.service1Desc: Search HS codes with duty rates, VAT, and applicable taxes — instantly.
landing.service2Desc: Stay current with import/export rules, prohibited goods, and required docs.
landing.service3Desc: Know your total landed cost before placing any order.
landing.service4Desc: Market analysis and bilateral trade data for smarter decisions.
landing.service5Desc: Generate declarations, certificates, and trade documents digitally.
landing.service6Desc: Connected to Algeria's electronic customs system for real-time tracking.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in minutes with our streamlined process
landing.step1Desc: Sign up and get instant platform access.
landing.step2Desc: Find tariff codes, regulations, and compliance requirements.
landing.step3Desc: Accurate duty calculations, full legal compliance.
landing.step4Desc: Track declarations and monitor shipments in real-time.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built specifically for Algerian trade professionals
landing.feature1Desc: Synchronized with official customs bulletins and regulatory changes as they happen.
landing.feature2Desc: Full support for Arabic, French, and English — search in your language.
landing.feature3Desc: Enterprise-grade encryption. Your trade data is always protected.
landing.feature4Desc: Certified customs experts to guide you through complex procedures.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Flexible plans for individuals, businesses, and enterprises
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: See what customs brokers, importers, and exporters say about our platform
landing.testimonial1Text: E-Douane has transformed my daily workflow. Tariff lookups that used to take hours now take seconds. The ALCES integration is seamless.
landing.testimonial2Text: The duty calculator alone saved us thousands in unexpected fees. We now have full visibility on landed costs before placing any order.
landing.testimonial3Text: Multi-language support is critical for our team. The Arabic interface is excellent and the regulatory updates keep us compliant.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Simplify Your Customs Operations?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of Algerian trade professionals who trust E-Douane for accurate, real-time customs data.
landing.footerDesc: Algeria's leading digital customs intelligence platform. Empowering trade professionals with accurate tariff data and compliance tools.
landing.footerMinistry: In partnership with Algerian Customs Administration

search.subtitle: Search tariff codes, duty rates, regulations, and more

search.fallbackBanner: No matches for "{original}". Showing results for "{used}".

search.footerInfo: {total} tariff codes in the Algerian customs database
search.multilingualHint: Search in English, French, or Arabic
